Home/AI Value Governance

Cost-to-value control loop

Govern AI value from request to receipt.

AI Value Governance gives teams a coherence layer for definitions, gates, receipts, workflow routing, approval paths, cost-to-value support, and execution telemetry. It helps leaders see what AI work actually moved, what blocked, and what should improve next.

Book an AI Value Governance Sprint→ Review proof bundle

Governance sprint

Separate motion from value.

Value definitions

Define which AI actions count as value, support work, blocked risk, or theater before dashboards blur the categories.

Execution telemetry

Track decisions, approvals, cost signals, routing outcomes, receipts, and weekly export records.

Improvement loops

Turn repeated failures into definitions, gates, workflow changes, or sandbox tests instead of repeating agent prompts.

Zero-drift reporting

Keep public claims, internal policy, memory, and live status aligned so teams stop explaining stale assumptions.

From sandbox to live

Govern before scaling execution.

The sprint maps AI workflows into approval paths, sandbox-to-live gates, receipt requirements, telemetry rows, and auto-heal candidates. It does not claim certification. It creates a working operating model that can be reviewed, improved, and handed to enterprise or regulated teams for diligence.

Sprint outputs

  • Value taxonomy and anti-theater rules
  • AI cost-to-value support model
  • Receipt and export requirements
  • Routing and approval-path map
  • Next gated workflow candidate
